free_text: Elastic Scattering of Polarized Protons from C-13
Phase-Shift Analyzed. Examined For Effects of Broad
.The Scattered Particles were Detected by Eight
Si(Li) Detectors Over the Range of Approx. 30 Degree
The Detectors were Collimated by 0.32*0.80 Cm Apertures
Set at a Distance of 12.7 Cm from the Target.
The Eight Detectors were Placed Symmetrically on the
Left and Right Sides of the Target For the Analyzing
By the McMaster Lamb-Shift Polarized Ion Source.
